name: Salads
description: Fresh salads with vegetables, meat, fish, and dressings.

name: Cold snacks
description: Light cold appetizers, vegetable, cheese, meat, and fish assortments.

name: Hot snacks
description: Tasty hot appetizers, seafood, cheese, and meat dishes.

name: First dishes
description: Soups and hot first courses of traditional and European cuisine.

name: Main dishes
description: Hearty main dishes with meat, potatoes, and traditional cuisine.

name: Side dishes
description: Tasty side dishes for main courses: vegetables, potatoes, and puree.

name: Pasta
description: Italian pasta with various sauces, meat, and seafood.

name: Fish dishes
description: Fish and seafood dishes prepared on the grill and in the oven.

name: Grill dishes
description: Meat dishes, shashlik, and grill menu prepared over open fire.

name: Kids menu
description: Tasty and simple dishes for children.

name: Desserts
description: Sweet desserts, ice cream, and fruit dishes.
